events.name: Seattle Seahawks at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — Tom Brady has had his share of memorable football games.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brady, Bucs beat Seahawks 21-16 in historic Germany game

headlines.description: — Count out the Vikings all you want. Patrick Peterson, Justin Jefferson and company keep finding ways to rally for victories in the most remarkable and improbable of ways.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vikings get critical Allen turnovers, stun Bills 33-30 in OT

headlines.description: — The Detroit Lions looked as if they were on their way to another loss trailing by 14 points in the fourth quarter.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lions overcome big effort by Fields, beat Bears 31-30

headlines.description: — Ryan Tannehill and the rest of the banged-up Tennessee Titans know opposing defenses start game plans around stopping two-time NFL rushing leader Derrick Henry.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tannehill returns, throws 2 TD passes as Titans beat Broncos

events.name: Jacksonville Jaguars at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs were rolling through the Jaguars defense when Jacksonville safety Andre Cisco delivered a helmet-to-helmet blow that left wide receiver JuJu Smith-Schuster motionless on the turf.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mahomes throws 4 TD passes as Chiefs beat Jaguars 27-17

headlines.description: — The “MVP!” chants for Tua Tagovailoa started early in the second half, and they didn't stop until after the game ended, as Tagovailoa flashed a smile and waved on his way off the field.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tagovailoa stays hot, throws for 3 TDs, Dolphins rout Browns

events.name: Houston Texans at New York Giants

headlines.description: — The New York Giants have been finding ways to win all season and they came up with a new one against the Houston Texans.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jones, Barkley lead Giants past Texans 24-16 for 7-2 start

events.name: New Orleans Saints at Pittsburgh Steelers

headlines.description: — T.J. Watt felt the familiar and still indescribable jolt the moment he emerged from the tunnel.
headlines.shortLinkText: Watt's return fuels Steelers to 20-10 win over shaky Saints

events.name: Indianapolis Colts at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — Jeff Saturday joked that the Indianapolis Colts will start calling zone-read plays for 37-year-old quarterback Matt Ryan.
headlines.shortLinkText: Matt Ryan, interim coach Saturday rally Colts past Raiders

events.name: Dallas Cowboys at Green Bay Packers

headlines.description: — Aaron Rodgers finally might have found a new big-play target.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rodgers rallies Packers past McCarthy's Cowboys 31-28 in OT

events.name: Arizona Cardinals at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — Colt McCoy realizes every time he steps on an NFL field these days might be his last chance to play, so the Cardinals' 36-year-old backup quarterback got some friends and relatives out to Los Angeles this weekend when he became pretty sure he would...
headlines.shortLinkText: McCoy leads Cards past Rams 27-17; Cooper Kupp injured

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at San Francisco 49ers

headlines.description: — For all the talk of how dynamic San Francisco's offense could look with Christian McCaffrey and Deebo Samuel, it was the 49ers defense that once again led the way.
headlines.shortLinkText: McCaffrey's TD, stout D lead 49ers past Chargers 22-16
